title: ophrys schlechteriana
side_effects: Ophrys schlechteriana can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems. Ingesting the plant's parts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Topical application of the plant's sap may cause redness, itching, and blistering, while prolonged exposure to its pollen can trigger respiratory issues in sensitive individuals. Improper use of Ophrys schlechteriana can also lead to interactions with medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
